_meta.description: Synapse patch profiles for different ESDE subsystems (GPT Audit Point C)
_meta.rationale: Projection and Relation Pipeline use different patch sets. Explicit profiles ensure reproducibility and prevent cross-contamination.

projection.description: Phase 8 Projection experiments — noun WSD focused. Excludes verb grounding patches (v3.1/v3.2) and tombstone hotfix (v3.3) which may introduce noise.

relation.description: Observation C Relation Pipeline — verb grounding focused. v3.1 (+42 edges, +5.8pt), v3.2 (+27 edges, +2.0pt), v3.3 (offer tombstone).

full.description: All patches combined — for integration testing only. Not recommended for individual subsystem experiments.
